description_long: This object is a rectangular sign with a bright green background and bold white capital letters spelling 'EXIT' across its face. The sign is bordered by a thin white frame, giving it a clean and highly visible appearance. The sides and back of the sign are plain and unmarked, with a uniform light gray color. The sign appears to be made from a lightweight, durable material such as plastic or metal, commonly used for safety and directional signage. Its design is simple and functional, intended to be easily noticed in emergency or wayfinding situations. The overall construction suggests it is suitable for mounting above doors or in corridors to indicate an exit route.
description: A rectangular green sign with bold white 'EXIT' text and a thin white border, designed for clear visibility in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green face with large white 'EXIT' text and a white border.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light gray edge with no visible markings or text.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, showing the 'EXIT' text and border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain, light gray edge.
